ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS FILED BY DEFENDANT 24-HOUR FITNESS USA HEARING SET FOR SEP-21-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND MOOT IN PART. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE MOTION IS MOOT AS TO THE FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SERVED UPON PLAINTIFFS JOSIAH BELL AND DAVID BELL. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFFS' FAILURE TO RESPOND AND LATE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFFS JOSIAH BELL AND DAVID BELL ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS PROPOUNDED TO THEM WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF BILLY WILSON IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO THE FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS PROPOUNDED TO HIM WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED AS THERE IS NO DECLARATION SETTING FORTH FACTS SUPPORTING THE AMOUNT OF ANY MONETARY SANCTION BEING SOUGHT. [C.C.P. SECTION 2023(C)] (612/HEWLETT)
ORDER GRANTING IN PART 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Estacio, CSR: JoAnn Prior.

Craig K. Martin, Atty. for Petitioner: Josiah Bell, present as Guardian at litem for: David Bell, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's Fees $750.00
A net balance of $2,250.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 3rd and Quesada, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
